channel.title: BBC Sport
channel.copyright: Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.

item.title: Fury teases Joshua fight at UFC White House alongside White
item.description: Tyson Fury says he is set to feature in a "massive announcement" from Zuffa Boxing and UFC president Dana White.

item.title: Twin aims of Welsh boxers Garan and Ioan Croft
item.description: The fiercely competitive 24-year-old identical twin brothers from west Wales are pushing each other to achieve titles after signing with Matchroom.

item.title: Rodriguez becomes three-weight world champion
item.description: Jesse 'Bam' Rodriguez stops fellow American Antonio Vargas in the sixth round to win the WBA bantamweight title.

item.title: Tommy Fury beats ex-strongman Hall in exhibition
item.description: Tommy Fury dedicates his victory over Eddie Hall to his newborn son after beating the former World's Strongest Man on points in Manchester.

item.title: No talks for Benn to fight Garcia - De La Hoya
item.description: There are no talks taking place over a fight between WBC welterweight champion Ryan Garcia and Conor Benn, according to Oscar de la Hoya.

item.title: Fury v Hall exhibition is boxing's latest surreal bout
item.description: Saturday's fight between Tommy Fury v Eddie Hall in Manchester will be an exhibition contest in what is boxing's latest surreal bout, blurring the lines between professional sport, entertainment and social media celebrity.

item.title: 'Who do you want me to fight?' - Fury's unusual bout against Hall
item.description: How boxer Tommy Fury and former World's Strongest Man Eddie Hall came to be facing each other in a fight on Saturday.

item.title: Briton Cameron to face Mayer in unification bout
item.description: Briton Chantelle Cameron will fight American Mikaela Mayer in a light-middleweight world title unification bout in Birmingham on 29 August.

item.title: Joyce set for return in Moscow against Suslenkov
item.description: Britain's Joe Joyce will return to the ring for the first time in more than a year when he faces undefeated Russian heavyweight Artem Suslenkov in Moscow.

item.title: Billam-Smith stops Rozicki in Zuffa Boxing's UK debut
item.description: Britain's Chris Billam-Smith marks Zuffa Boxing's UK debut show with a gritty performance to beat Ryan Rozicki by technical knockout after seven gruelling rounds in Bournemouth.

item.title: How Taylor finally landed dream Croke Park swansong
item.description: Katie Taylor says "I'm definitely going to have to hold back the tears" when she walks out for her final professional fight at Croke Park in Dublin on 5 September.

item.title: Watch every episode
item.description: Natasha Jonas and Chris Eubank Jr feature

item.title: 'Not a fake fight' - Usyk on Verhoeven & helping Joshua
item.description: Oleksandr Usyk says he is training with the "same intensity" as always for Saturday's fight against Rico Verhoeven.

item.title: Battle of heavy hitters - Wardley & Dubois' best knockouts
item.description: Watch Fabio Wardley's and Daniel Dubois' best knockouts, before they face each other on Saturday.

item.title: What is Zuffa Boxing and can it shake up the sport?
item.description: From promoter rivalries to the shock signing of some big names, Zuffa Boxing's start to life in the sport has been far from quiet.

item.title: 'Cousin Amir opened doors, now it's my time' - Abdul Khan
item.description: Abdul Khan tells BBC Sport about learning from his cousin Amir, a former world champion, and his ambitions to reach the pinnacle of the sport.

item.title: How a kickboxing legend & Statham's pal landed a shot at Usyk
item.description: Dutchman Rico Verhoeven discusses his kickboxing career, friendship with A-list celebrities and how he landed a shot at Oleksandr Usyk.

item.title: Defiant Dubois sheds quitter tag to write new narrative
item.description: Daniel Dubois faced questions over his heart and mentality before facing Fabio Wardley, but silenced his critics by overcoming adversity to become WBO heavyweight champion.

item.title: The decade-long struggle to get AJ & Fury together
item.description: Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua shared a moment on Saturday, but getting the British heavyweights together this year may not be as straightforward as many suspected.

item.title: 'A messed-up situation' - world champion Dubois on family rift
item.description: Caroline Dubois opens up about her family rift and says she wants to reconcile with her brother Daniel, as she looks to unify lightweight world titles.

item.title: 'Kicked to the kerb' - is boxing failing its heroes?
item.description: Following the death of Ricky Hatton, families and former champions tell a new BBC documentary the sport has not filled the void in care for its fighters.

item.title: 'You're under arrest' - how Ngamba made history against all odds
item.description: Cindy Ngamba shares her incredible story from refugee to Olympic medallist.

item.title: 'I wouldn't wish what I went through on my worst enemy'
item.description: Undisputed middleweight boxing world champion Claressa Shields opens up about her harrowing journey to the top of her sport.

item.title: From rock bottom to three world titles at 37
item.description: Natasha Jonas tells her story, including what it took to come back and win three world titles at 37.

item.title: Being a Eubank, living up to dad and dealing with grief
item.description: Born To Brawl: Chris Eubank Jr tells his story of grief and living up to his dad

item.title: Are Prince Naseem Hamed's sons coming for his throne?
item.description: Get to know the Hameds' journey ahead of Aadam Hamed's debut on the Oleksandr Usyk v Daniel Dubois undercard.

item.title: Tyson rates him: Is traveller Dennis McCann boxing's next superstar?
item.description: Tyson Fury tips traveller boxer Dennis ‘The Menace’ McCann as future world champion

item.title: Phantom v Price - can a Gladiator keep up with a world champion?
item.description: Lauren Price meet Gladiator Phantom for a training session in the boxing gym.

item.title: Church told me I was possessed by demons aged 12
item.description: Conor Benn tells BBC Sport about growing up in an "extreme" Christian school, being told he was "demon-possessed" and how he had to rebuild a relationship with his father Nigel.

item.title: 'I gave everything to boxing and still have nothing'
item.description: Heather Hardy tells BBC Sport how she is adapting to life outside of boxing after the former world champion was left with a life-threatening injury.
